title: Christmas Gift Tags Traditional Classic Santa Xmas Tree Robin Xmas Pack 20 Co-Ordinating Foiled
features: SEASONAL COORDINATION: These gift tags are thoughtfully designed to complement your holiday presents. Each pack includes four assorted coordinating designs, ensuring your gifts look beautifully festive.
TRADITIONAL FESTIVE DESIGNS: Classic holiday designs, including Santa Claus, Merry Christmas Tree and a Festive Robin, bring joy and heartwarming touch to your gift wrapping.
PERSONALIZATION MADE EASY: The reverse side of each tag is blank, allowing you to add your personal message or recipient's name, creating a truly customized touch.
AMPLE QUANTITY: With 20 gift tags in each pack, you'll have more than enough to adorn your gifts for family and friends during the festive season.
PERFECT SIZE: Each tag measures approximately 90 x 55mm, providing enough space for your messages and making them suitable for various gift sizes.
description: Elevate your gift-giving with our Pack of 20 Coordinating Christmas Design Gift Tags. These tags are designed to add a festive and personalized touch to your holiday presents, tags including Santa Claus, Merry Christmas Tree and a Festive Robin, bring joy and heartwarming touch to your gift wrapping. Perfect for adding that special finishing touch to your gifts, each pack includes 20 tags with four assorted coordinating designs, ensuring your gifts stand out under the tree.
